pre_game.message: Hey, I'm E. First time doing something like this? I gotta say, I'm pretty nervous but also hopeful—really need this to work out for my family. What brings you here today?

Hey E, nice to meet you! Yeah, first time for me too actually. I'm here because I've got this dream trip to Japan I want to make happen—been saving up, but winning here would make it all come together. What's the situation with your family, if you don't mind me asking?

Oh man, yeah... I lost my job a couple months back and I'm the only one working—well, was working. Got five mouths to feed at home, no savings left, so I really need to make something happen here. Japan sounds amazing though, that's a solid dream to have.

That's really tough, man—five people depending on you is a lot of pressure. I can hear how much you need this. I hope things turn around for you soon, and honestly, I think your determination will help. We've both got something to fight for here, so let's both do our best.
Thanks, C—I really appreciate that. Yeah, it's been stressful, but talking to someone who gets it helps. You've got your dream too, so let's both bring our A-game today. Good luck out there.
You got it, E. We're both going in with our heads high—let's make this count for both of us. Good luck out there, man.
Thanks, man. Really means a lot. Let's both walk out of here with what we came for—you're getting that Japan trip, and I'm taking care of my family. We got this.
Absolutely, man. We both deserve this—let's go out there and make it happen. You've got this.
Thanks, C. Same to you—let's both come through today. See you out there.
You got it, E. Let's make it happen for both of us.
